members.name: ConnectToPeer
members.signature: public int ConnectToPeer(PacketPeerUDP packetPeer, String hostname, TLSOptions clientOptions)
members.summary: Connects a [param packet_peer] beginning the DTLS handshake using the underlying [PacketPeerUDP] which must be connected (see [method PacketPeerUDP.connect_to_host]). You can optionally specify the [param client_options] to be used while verifying the TLS connections. See [method TLSOptions.client] and [method TLSOptions.client_unsafe].

members.name: DisconnectFromPeer
members.summary: Disconnects this peer, terminating the DTLS session.

members.name: GetStatus
members.summary: Returns the status of the connection.

members.name: Poll
members.summary: Poll the connection to check for incoming packets. Call this frequently to update the status and keep the connection working.

values.name: STATUS_CONNECTED
values.summary: A status representing a [PacketPeerDTLS] that is connected to a remote peer.

values.name: STATUS_DISCONNECTED
values.summary: A status representing a [PacketPeerDTLS] that is disconnected.

values.name: STATUS_ERROR
values.summary: A status representing a [PacketPeerDTLS] in a generic error state.

values.name: STATUS_ERROR_HOSTNAME_MISMATCH
values.summary: An error status that shows a mismatch in the DTLS certificate domain presented by the host and the domain requested for validation.

values.name: STATUS_HANDSHAKING
values.summary: A status representing a [PacketPeerDTLS] that is currently performing the handshake with a remote peer.

constants.name: STATUS_DISCONNECTED
constants.summary: A status representing a [PacketPeerDTLS] that is disconnected.

constants.name: STATUS_HANDSHAKING
constants.summary: A status representing a [PacketPeerDTLS] that is currently performing the handshake with a remote peer.

constants.name: STATUS_CONNECTED
constants.summary: A status representing a [PacketPeerDTLS] that is connected to a remote peer.

constants.name: STATUS_ERROR
constants.summary: A status representing a [PacketPeerDTLS] in a generic error state.

constants.name: STATUS_ERROR_HOSTNAME_MISMATCH
constants.summary: An error status that shows a mismatch in the DTLS certificate domain presented by the host and the domain requested for validation.
